response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX/embedded environments, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience as required
Zero evidence of Linux kernel analysis or modification skills
No Japanese language proficiency; essential for collaboration in Japan-based team
